name: Scottish Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Coat a baking sheet with non-stick cooking spray.
3. In a medium-size bowl, sift dry ingredients together.
4. Add butter, mixing into flour with your fingers until crumbly.
5. Add buttermilk and knead the dough to a soft consistency.
6. Fold in raisins.
7. On a floured board, roll out dough to 1/2 inch thick.
8. Cut into 16 rounds.
9. Place on a baking sheet and bake for 15 to 20 minutes, until golden brown.
10. Makes 16 scones. Food Exchanges per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE; CAL: 97; CHO:7mg; CAR: 3g; SOD: 3g; FAT: 3g.
